title: Objects, Classes, Namespaces, and Binding · Behavior Case: Oop Object Identity Type
summary: Model a library circulation domain while tracing real Python object and attribute behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop object identity type increment in an inspectable library domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reason about object identity, type, value, mutability, equality, and lifetime in an object-oriented design.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
